franchisor_address: 8000 Tower, Suite 700, 8331 Norman Center Drive, Bloomington, MN 55437

concept_description.value: Quick service food restaurant with indoor seating selling the full line of approved DQ soft-serve, treat, food and beverage menu items. Two prototypical freestanding buildings: Next Gen Core 34 (1,938 sq ft, seats 34) and Next Gen Core 46 (2,208 sq ft, seats 46). Street locations (freestanding/strip) and Captive-venue locations (malls, airports, campus, etc.).

initial_franchise_fee.refund_conditions: Withdrawal before construction; training failure; no site in 90 days; no construction in 180 days

sales_promotion_fee.determination: ADQ determines within range; 90 days advance notice of adjustment

termination_fee.formula: 2× continuing license fee for last 12 months of active operations; or 24× average monthly if <12 months; or remaining months × average if <24 months remain

territory.franchisor_competition_rights: ADQ and affiliates may operate and franchise competing businesses at any location except the specific authorized location. May sell via internet, catalog, telemarketing, social media, mobile apps, third-party platforms without compensation.
territory.multi_unit_trade_area: MultiTRA grants non-exclusive development right with designated trade areas, subject to ADQ carve-outs for large venues, institutional locations, and pre-existing commitments

franchise_term.renewal_years: Shorter of 10 years or remaining lease term
franchise_term.renewal_conditions: Sign then-current agreement (may differ materially); modernize; good standing; pay $22,500 renewal fee; sign release

noncompete.during_term: No involvement in quick-service restaurant serving hamburgers (without alcohol) or business generating >10% revenue from frozen treats (Competitive Business)
noncompete.post_term: 500 meters from authorized location for 1 year (Street); same building/venue (Captive-venue)

dispute_resolution.method: Arbitration in Minneapolis, MN (except certain claims)
dispute_resolution.litigation_forum: Federal District Court for District of Minnesota or Hennepin County District Court, Minneapolis
dispute_resolution.governing_law: Law of state where authorized location is situated
dispute_resolution.state_overrides: Multiple state addenda modify dispute resolution (CA, IL, MD, MN, ND, WA)

schedule_a.population: Newly constructed freestanding restaurants, opened Jan 2014–Dec 2023, all 12 months reported, franchisee-owned
schedule_a.excludes: Texas DQ, conversions, fuel centers, non-traditional, territory operator subfranchised

schedule_b.manageable_profit_definition: Gross Sales minus COGS, Labor, and Restaurant Controllables. BEFORE occupancy, insurance, royalties, sales promotion fees, legal, accounting, admin.
schedule_b.sample_limitation: 2024 has only 55 usable P&Ls (285 excluded from 321 qualifying restaurants)

item_21_financials.guarantee: IDQ unconditionally guarantees ADQ's obligations to franchisees

notable_pending: Project Lonestar v. ADQ (N.D. Texas): breach of contract/fraud re transfer process
D'Elia named in Domino's securities class action (ADQ not a party)
ADQ v. Estate of Ridl (MN): termination for abandonment
Oshlo-Wilkinson v. ADQ (Iowa): territory transfer dispute

financing.notes: ADQ does not offer financing. May arrange introductions to third-party lenders.

training.location: Phase 1-2: certified DQ location; Phase 3: Minneapolis HQ

supply_chain.entity: Unified Supply Chain, Inc. (USCI), wholly owned by IDQ

advertising_fund.management_fee: 7% of sales promotion payments (not taken above 3% of gross sales)
advertising_fund.audit_type: Independent national accounting firm annual review
